name: Joe's Golf : Simulator - Repairs - Consignment Sales (Appointment Based Service)
about: Joe's Golf LLC is a family-owned business established in May 2019 in Southport, North Carolina. The venue offers a unique combination of golf simulator services, club repairs, grip sales, and consignment equipment, all operating on an appointment-only basis. Owner Joe Biernat handles all services personally to maintain reasonable pricing for local golfers. The facility emphasizes practical support for golfers, providing opportunities to test used equipment on the simulator before purchase and offering professional club fitting and regripping services.
why_golfers_like_it: Personalized service from the owner who performs all work
Ability to test used equipment on the simulator before purchase
Professional putter grip fitting system with multiple grip options
Focus on practical golf support at reasonable prices

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own clubs. However, the facility does offer club repairs and regripping services, and you can try used equipment on the simulator before purchasing.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No information is provided about bringing food and drinks. The venue appears to focus on golf services without food or beverage offerings.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The simulator offers sessions of one hour, one and a half hours, and two hours, though specific time requirements for 18 holes are not detailed.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No specific information about kid-friendliness is provided. The venue appears to cater to serious golfers and those seeking equipment services.
